notes: Core structure exists but the game is barely playable: lane/grid coordinate mapping is broken (frog starts at gridY=14 but river collision checks gridY 2-7 while road checks 9-13 don't align with actual pixel positions), the frog spawns off-center visually, river object 'row' values don't match frog gridY correctly causing constant false drowning deaths, and the timer decrements far too fast due to a dt calculation bug (dt is multiplied into the already-per-frame time subtraction).
Core Frogger structure exists, but lane/grid alignment and collision logic appear inconsistent enough to hurt fairness and make the build feel only partially correct.
